title: Ipca Laboratories is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Ipca Laboratories is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Ipca Laboratories has an exciting opening for a Consultant Physician at our Hyderabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Ipca Laboratories:
Ipca Laboratories is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in ICD-10

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ipca Laboratories!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
